user.title: Configure Dynamic Weather & Health
user.description: Choose a moving entity to track OR select 'Use Manual Location' and provide coordinates. Then pick your desired sensors.

data_description.enable_smart_cache: Highly Recommended! Prevents unnecessary API calls by reusing data if the tracked entity hasn't moved more than 2km within the last 7 minutes (Weather) or 29 minutes (Air Quality).

error.missing_entity: You must select an Entity OR check 'Use Manual Location'.

init.title: Configure Refresh Rates & Sensors
init.description:
Set the update interval and select which sensors you want active.

📊 **Current Global Usage:** {current_requests} / 10,000 requests per day.

💡 **Note:** If you uncheck a sensor here, its entity will be automatically deleted from your system as soon as you click Submit.

data_description.enable_smart_cache: Highly Recommended! Prevents unnecessary API calls by reusing data if the tracked entity hasn't moved more than 2km within the last 7 minutes (Weather) or 29 minutes (Air Quality).

error.api_limit_exceeded: Global API limit will be exceeded (> 9500 requests/day). Please increase the intervals.
